sglang.title: [Fix] Orphan process in data parallel
sglang.author: Capronir
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
When dp_size > 1, the process tree is "launch_server -> data_parallel_controller -> sglang::scheduler_*".
However, the data_parallel_controller process does not watch the state of its parent process (launch_server). As a result, if launch_server crashes, data_parallel_controller will beco

vllm.title: [Core] Use sha256 bytes instead of BlockHash to reduce GC overhead
vllm.author: linzebing
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
The current BlockHash design stores the hash value alongside a tuple of all token IDs and any extra keys to prevent collisions, and BlockHashWithGroupId layers a group identifier on top of that structure. Every block therefore retains a tuple of Python integers for its tokens, creating many
